title: `Oreb #6159
definition:
Oreb = "raven"

 n pr m
 1) one of the chieftains of the Midianite army defeated by Gideon

 n pr loc
 2) a rock east of the Jordan where Oreb and part of his army fell
    to the Ephraimites
nasbUsage:

 n pr m

 n pr loc

    to the Ephraimites
